7:["$","p","p-53",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["Voiceover script:"]}]
22:T448,What works now: Lead the first 90 seconds from /start into /govern with a real wallet-first path. Use /proof/?judge=1, trust package, diagnostics, and services as the second-stage proof of maturity. Keep the README, deck, story video, and product learning path perfectly aligned with the live site. What is externally proven: Proof center via /proof and Launch trust packet via /documents/launch-trust-packet and Treasury reviewer packet via /documents/treasury-reviewer-packet and Reviewer telemetry packet via /documents/reviewer-telemetry-packet. Exact blocker: upgrade-authority-multisig. The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded. Best product route: open /start first. Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the product story across routes. Close the route by opening /documents/treasury-reviewer-packet and /documents/reviewer-telemetry-packet so payments readiness and the data corridor stay inside the same proof story.8:["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","p","p-57",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["$22"]}]}]
